text: As I stand in this modern, softly lit museum space, the crisp lines of architecture and the reflective surfaces stir a feeling of curiosity and contemplation in me. The presence of glass, color, and printed displays evokes a sense of stepping both forward and inward: forward into the possibilities of innovation, inward to ask deeper questions about knowledge and progress. I feel a gentle excitement, as if I am on the verge of discovering ideas that challenge what I know.
